title: Radar
description: Helping crowdsource fishing spots on MCC Island
body:
# Radar Radar is the mod helping crowdsource fishing spots on MCC Island and showcasing them on an online map. This mod works in the background while you fish to passivly upload the spots you fish at, while providing minimal distractions. ## How to use Simply find a fishing spot on MCC Island and fish. If you're the first person to have fished there, the spot will be uploaded to the map. ![Successfully uploading spot](https://cdn.themysterys.com/7yIexKJ5Ba.gif) The online map can be viewed here: [https://radar.themysterys.com/](https://radar.themysterys.com/) ## Questions
Click to Open Do I need to install this mod to use the map?: No this mod is for players who wish to help share spots. You can freely use the map without it.

Does this mod provide an ingame map?: No. Minimaps are not allowed on MCC Island and such this mod does not provide a way to view spots ingame.

Why do I keep seeing blue particles when I fish?: Particles are how the mod comunicates with the player. Blue means that a spot has already been uploaded to the map. You can view a full list by using the /radar colors command.
